lines.speaker: 孙月
lines.chinese: 听说你男朋友李进跟你是一个学校的，是你同学吗?
lines.pinyin: Tingshuō nǐ nánpéngyǒu Lǐ Jìn gēn nǐ shì yī gè xuéxiào de, shì nǐ tóngxué ma?
lines.english: I heard your boyfriend Li Jin is from the same school as you. Is he your classmate?

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 是的，他学的是新闻，我学的是法律，我和他不是一个班。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, tā xué de shì xīnwén, wǒ xué de shì fǎlǜ, wǒ hé tā bú shì yī gè bān.
lines.english: Yes, he studied journalism, I studied law, he and I were not in the same class.

lines.speaker: 孙月
lines.chinese: 那你们俩是怎么认识的?
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐmen liǎ shì zěnme rènshi de?
lines.english: Then how did you two meet?

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 我们是在一次足球比赛中认识的。我们班跟他们班比赛，他一个人踢进两个球，我对他印象很深，后来就慢慢熟悉了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen shì zài yī cì zúqiú bǐsài zhōng rènshi de. Wǒmen bān gēn tāmen bān bǐsài, tā yī gè rén tī jìn liǎng gè qiú, wǒ duì tā yìnxiàng hěn shēn, hòulái jiù mànman shúxi le.
lines.english: We met during a soccer match. Our class played against their class, he scored two goals by himself, I had a deep impression of him, and later we gradually got familiar.

lines.speaker: 孙月
lines.chinese: 你为什么喜欢他?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ wèishénme xǐhuan tā?
lines.english: Why do you like him?

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 他不仅足球踢得好，性格也不错。
lines.pinyin: Tā bùjǐn zúqiú tī de hǎo, xìnggé yě búcuò.
lines.english: He not only plays soccer well, but also has a good personality.

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 李老师，我下个月5号就要结婚了。
lines.pinyin: Lǐ lǎoshī, wǒ xià gè yuè wǔ hào jiù yào jiéhūn le.
lines.english: Teacher Li, I'm getting married on the 5th of next month.

lines.speaker: 李老师
lines.chinese: 你是在开玩笑吧? 你们不是才认识一个月?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shì zài kāiwánxiào ba? Nǐmen bú shì cái rènshi yī gè yuè?
lines.english: Are you kidding? Haven't you only known each other for a month?

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 虽然我们认识的时间不长，但我从来没这么快乐过。
lines.pinyin: Suīrán wǒmen rènshi de shíjiān bù cháng, dàn wǒ cónglái méi zhème kuàilè guo.
lines.english: Although we haven't known each other long, I've never been this happy.

lines.speaker: 李老师
lines.chinese: 两个人在一起，最好能有共同的兴趣和爱好。
lines.pinyin: Liǎng gè rén zài yīqǐ, zuìhǎo néng yǒu gòngtóng de xìngqù hé àihào.
lines.english: When two people are together, it's best to have common interests and hobbies.

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 我们有很多共同的爱好，经常一起打球、唱歌、做菜。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen yǒu hěn duō gòngtóng de àihào, jīngcháng yīqǐ dǎ qiú, chàng gē, zuò cài.
lines.english: We have many common hobbies, often play ball, sing, and cook together.

lines.speaker: 李老师
lines.chinese: 看来你真的找到适合你的人了。祝你们幸福!
lines.pinyin: Kànlái nǐ zhēn de zhǎodào shìhé nǐ de rén le. Zhù nǐmen xìngfú!
lines.english: It seems you've really found someone suitable for you. Wishing you happiness!

lines.speaker: 高老师
lines.chinese: 听说您跟妻子结婚快二十年了?
lines.pinyin: Tīngshuō nín gēn qīzi jiéhūn kuài èrshí nián le?
lines.english: I heard you and your wife have been married for almost 20 years?

lines.speaker: 李老师
lines.chinese: 到6月9号，我们就结婚二十年了。
lines.pinyin: Dào liù yuè jiǔ hào, wǒmen jiù jiéhūn èrshí nián le.
lines.english: By June 9th, we will have been married for 20 years.

lines.speaker: 高老师
lines.chinese: 我和丈夫刚结婚的时候，每天都觉得很新鲜，在一起有说不完的话。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hé zhàngfu gāng jiéhūn de shíhou, měi tiān dōu juéde hěn xīnxiān, zài yīqǐ yǒu shuō bu wán de huà.
lines.english: When my husband and I just got married, every day felt fresh, we had endless things to talk about together.

lines.speaker: 李老师
lines.chinese: 两个人共同生活，只有浪漫和新鲜感是不够的。
lines.pinyin: Liǎng gè rén gòngtóng shēnghuó, zhǐyǒu làngmàn hé xīnxiān gǎn shì bú gòu de.
lines.english: For two people living together, having only romance and freshness is not enough.

lines.speaker: 高老师
lines.chinese: 您说的对！我现在每天看到的都是他的缺点。
lines.pinyin: Nín shuō de duì! Wǒ xiànzài měi tiān kàndào de dōu shì tā de quēdiǎn.
lines.english: You're right! Now what I see every day are his shortcomings.

lines.speaker: 李老师
lines.chinese: 两个人在一起时间长了，就会慢慢接受他的缺点，你们才能更好地一起生活。
lines.pinyin: Liǎng gè rén zài yīqǐ shíjiān cháng le, jiù huì mànman jiēshòu tā de quēdiǎn, nǐmen cáinéng gèng hǎo de yīqǐ shēnghuó.
lines.english: When two people are together for a long time, you will gradually accept his shortcomings, and then you can live together better.

lines.speaker: 小夏
lines.chinese: 来中国快一年了，你适应这儿的生活了吗?
lines.pinyin: Lái Zhōngguó kuài yī nián le, nǐ shìyìng zhèr de shēnghuó le ma?
lines.english: You've been in China for almost a year, have you adapted to life here?

lines.speaker: 马克
lines.chinese: 开始有点儿不习惯，后来就慢慢适应了，最近我还交了个中国朋友。
lines.pinyin: Kāishǐ yǒudiǎnr bù xíguàn, hòulái jiù mànman shìyìng le, zuìjìn wǒ hái jiāo le gè Zhōngguó péngyǒu.
lines.english: At first I wasn't used to it, then I gradually adapted. Recently I even made a Chinese friend.

lines.speaker: 小夏
lines.chinese: 那就好，快给我讲讲你新交的中国朋友。
lines.pinyin: Nà jiù hǎo, kuài gěi wǒ jiǎngjiang nǐ xīnjiāo de Zhōngguó péngyǒu.
lines.english: That's good, tell me quickly about your new Chinese friend.

lines.speaker: 马克
lines.chinese: 我们是在图书馆认识的。平时我们常常一起看书、逛街、踢足球。有时候他还给我发一些幽默短信。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen shì zài túshūguǎn rènshi de. Píngshí wǒmen chángcháng yīqǐ kàn shū, guàngjiē, tī zúqiú. Yǒu shíhou tā hái gěi wǒ fā yīxiē yōumò duǎnxìn.
lines.english: We met at the library. Usually we often read books, go shopping, and play soccer together. Sometimes he also sends me humorous text messages.

lines.speaker: 小夏
lines.chinese: 你的这个朋友真不错！下次介绍我们认识认识，怎么样?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de zhège péngyǒu zhēn búcuò! Xià cì jièshào wǒmen rènshi rènshi, zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: Your friend sounds great! Next time introduce us, how about that?

lines.speaker: 马克
lines.chinese: 没问题！我们下午要去踢足球，正好一起去吧。
lines.pinyin: Méi wèntí! Wǒmen xiàwǔ yào qù tī zúqiú, zhènghǎo yīqǐ qù ba.
lines.english: No problem! We're going to play soccer this afternoon, come along with us.

lines.speaker: 小李
lines.chinese: 星期天同学聚会，你能来吗?
lines.pinyin: Xīngqītiān tóngxué jùhuì, nǐ néng lái ma?
lines.english: Can you come to the classmate gathering on Sunday?

lines.speaker: 小林
lines.chinese: 能来。班里同学你联系得怎么样了? 来多少人?
lines.pinyin: Néng lái. Bān lǐ tóngxué nǐ liánxì de zěnmeyàng le? Lái duōshǎo rén?
lines.english: I can come. How are you doing with contacting classmates? How many people are coming?

lines.speaker: 小李
lines.chinese: 差不多一半儿吧，张远还专门从国外飞回来呢。
lines.pinyin: Chàbùduō yībànr ba, Zhāng Yuǎn hái zhuānmén cóng guówài fēi huílái ne.
lines.english: About half, Zhang Yuan even flew back specially from abroad.

lines.speaker: 小林
lines.chinese: 是吗？毕业都快十年了，真想大家啊！
lines.pinyin: Shì ma? Bìyè dōu kuài shí nián le, zhēn xiǎng dàjiā a!
lines.english: Really? It's been almost 10 years since graduation, I really miss everyone!

lines.speaker: 孙月
lines.chinese: 这是什么时候的照片? 你真年轻!
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì shénme shíhou de zhàopiàn? Nǐ zhēn niánqīng!
lines.english: When was this photo taken? You look so young!

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 这是上大学时的照片。一看到这张照片，我就想起过去那段快乐的日子，好像重新回到了校园。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì shàng dàxué shí de zhàopiàn. Yī kàndào zhè zhāng zhàopiàn, wǒ jiù xiǎngqǐ guòqù nà duàn kuàilè de rìzi, hǎoxiàng chóngxīn huídào le xiàoyuán.
lines.english: This is from my university days. Seeing this photo, I think of those happy days from the past, as if I've returned to campus.

lines.speaker: 孙月
lines.chinese: 旁边这个人一定是你的好朋友吧? 你们现在还联系吗?
lines.pinyin: Pángbiān zhège rén yīdìng shì nǐ de hǎo péngyǒu ba? Nǐmen xiànzài hái liánxì ma?
lines.english: This person next to you must be your good friend, right? Do you still keep in touch?

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 当然了，尽管已经毕业这么多年，我们还是经常联系的，每次都有说不完的话。
lines.pinyin: Dāngrán le, jǐnguǎn yǐjīng bìyè zhème duō nián, wǒmen háishi jīngcháng liánxì de, měi cì dōu yǒu shuō bu wán de huà.
lines.english: Of course, even though we've graduated so many years, we still keep in touch often, every time we have endless things to talk about.

vocabulary.english: to have a party; party, get-together

title: 经理对我印象不错
title_english: I've made a good impression on the manager

lines.speaker: 小夏
lines.chinese: 你上午的面试怎么样?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shàngwǔ de miànshì zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How was your interview this morning?

lines.speaker: 小雨
lines.chinese: 还可以，他们问的问题都挺容易的，就是我有点儿紧张。
lines.pinyin: Hái kěyǐ, tāmen wèn de wèntí dōu tǐng róngyì de, jiùshì wǒ yǒudiǎnr jǐnzhāng.
lines.english: It was okay, the questions they asked were quite easy, but I was a bit nervous.

lines.speaker: 小夏
lines.chinese: 面试的时候，一定要对自己有信心，要相信自己的能力。
lines.pinyin: Miànshì de shíhou, yīdìng yào duì zìjǐ yǒu xìnxīn, yào xiāngxìn zìjǐ de nénglì.
lines.english: During an interview, you must have confidence in yourself, you need to believe in your abilities.

lines.speaker: 小雨
lines.chinese: 你说的对！3月15号上午8点在学校体育馆还有一个招聘会，你去吗?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì! Sān yuè shíwǔ hào shàngwǔ bā diǎn zài xuéxiào tǐyùguǎn hái yǒu yī gè zhāopìn huì, nǐ qù ma?
lines.english: You're right! On March 15th at 8am there's another job fair at the school gym, are you going?

lines.speaker: 小夏
lines.chinese: 我还没决定呢。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hái méi juédìng ne.
lines.english: I haven't decided yet.

lines.speaker: 小雨
lines.chinese: 听说这次招聘会提供的工作机会挺多的，你去看看吧。
lines.pinyin: Tīngshuō zhè cì zhāopìn huì tígōng de gōngzuò jīhuì tǐng duō de, nǐ qù kànkan ba.
lines.english: I heard this job fair has quite a lot of job opportunities, go take a look.

lines.speaker: 小林
lines.chinese: 王静，好久不见了！大学毕业后就没联系了，你现在在哪儿工作呢?
lines.pinyin: Wáng Jìng, hǎojiǔ bú jiàn le! Dàxué bìyè hòu jiù méi liánxì le, nǐ xiànzài zài nǎr gōngzuò ne?
lines.english: Wang Jing, long time no see! We haven't been in touch since graduation, where are you working now?

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 我一毕业就去上海当律师了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yī bìyè jiù qù Shànghǎi dāng lǜshī le.
lines.english: As soon as I graduated, I went to Shanghai to work as a lawyer.

lines.speaker: 小林
lines.chinese: 你对现在的工作一定非常满意吧?
lines.pinyin: Nǐ duì xiànzài de gōngzuò yīdìng fēicháng mǎnyì ba?
lines.english: You must be very satisfied with your current job, right?

lines.speaker: 王静
lines.chinese: 我很满意。经理对我印象不错，同事们对我也很好。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hěn mǎnyì. Jīnglǐ duì wǒ yìnxiàng búcuò, tóngshìmen duì wǒ yě hěn hǎo.
lines.english: I'm very satisfied. The manager has a good impression of me, and colleagues are very good to me too.

lines.speaker: 小林
lines.chinese: 真羡慕你！能做自己喜欢的工作多好啊。
lines.pinyin: Zhēn xiànmù nǐ! Néng zuò zìjǐ xǐhuan de gōngzuò duō hǎo a.
lines.english: I envy you! Being able to do work you like is so great.

title: 不要太着急赚钱
title_english: Don't be too anxious to make money

lines.speaker: 父亲
lines.chinese: 儿子，你毕业后的打算是什么？
lines.pinyin: Érzi, nǐ bìyè hòu de dǎsuàn shì shénme?
lines.english: Son, what's your plan after graduation?

lines.speaker: 儿子
lines.chinese: 我想先找个工作，多赚点儿钱。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng xiān zhǎo gè gōngzuò, duō zhuàn diǎnr qián.
lines.english: I want to find a job first and earn more money.

lines.speaker: 父亲
lines.chinese: 不要太着急赚钱，刚毕业最重要的是积累经验。
lines.pinyin: Bú yào tài zháojí zhuàn qián, gāng bìyè zuì zhòngyào de shì jīlěi jīngyàn.
lines.english: Don't be too anxious to make money. The most important thing after graduation is to gain experience.

lines.speaker: 儿子
lines.chinese: 可是我的同学们工资都很高。
lines.pinyin: Kěshì wǒ de tóngxuémen gōngzī dōu hěn gāo.
lines.english: But my classmates all have high salaries.

lines.speaker: 父亲
lines.chinese: 工资高不一定就是好工作，要看发展机会。
lines.pinyin: Gōngzī gāo bù yídìng jiùshì hǎo gōngzuò, yào kàn fāzhǎn jīhuì.
lines.english: High salary doesn't necessarily mean a good job. You need to look at development opportunities.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 听说你换了新工作？
lines.pinyin: Tīngshuō nǐ huàn le xīn gōngzuò?
lines.english: I heard you changed jobs?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 是的，虽然工资比以前低，但是我更喜欢现在的工作。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, suīrán gōngzī bǐ yǐqián dī, dànshì wǒ gèng xǐhuan xiànzài de gōngzuò.
lines.english: Yes, although the salary is lower than before, I like my current job more.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 为什么？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme?
lines.english: Why?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 因为这里可以学到很多东西，对我的发展很有帮助。
lines.pinyin: Yīnwèi zhèlǐ kěyǐ xué dào hěn duō dōngxi, duì wǒ de fāzhǎn hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
lines.english: Because I can learn a lot here, it's very helpful for my development.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 你来公司两年了，有什么感想？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ lái gōngsī liǎng nián le, yǒu shénme gǎnxiǎng?
lines.english: You've been at the company for two years, what are your thoughts?

lines.speaker: 员工
lines.chinese: 我学到很多，也积累了不少经验。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xué dào hěn duō, yě jīlěi le bùshǎo jīngyàn.
lines.english: I've learned a lot and accumulated quite a bit of experience.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 年轻人不要太着急赚钱，要先把基础打好。
lines.pinyin: Niánqīngrén bú yào tài zháojí zhuàn qián, yào xiān bǎ jīchǔ dǎ hǎo.
lines.english: Young people shouldn't be too anxious to make money, first build a good foundation.

lines.speaker: 员工
lines.chinese: 谢谢您的建议，我会继续努力的。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie nín de jiànyì, wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì de.
lines.english: Thank you for your advice, I will continue to work hard.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你觉得什么样的工作是好工作？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juéde shénme yàng de gōngzuò shì hǎo gōngzuò?
lines.english: What kind of job do you think is a good job?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 工资高、压力小的工作。
lines.pinyin: Gōngzī gāo, yālì xiǎo de gōngzuò.
lines.english: A job with high salary and low pressure.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我不同意，我觉得有发展前途的工作才是好工作。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bù tóngyì, wǒ juéde yǒu fāzhǎn qiántú de gōngzuò cái shì hǎo gōngzuò.
lines.english: I disagree, I think a job with prospects is a good job.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 你说得对，不能只看眼前的利益。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, bù néng zhǐ kàn yǎnqián de lìyì.
lines.english: You're right, can't just look at immediate benefits.

title: 买对的，不买贵的
title_english: Buy what's right, not what's expensive

lines.speaker: 售货员
lines.chinese: 您好，这是今年最新款的手机。
lines.pinyin: Nín hǎo, zhè shì jīnnián zuìxīn kuǎn de shǒujī.
lines.english: Hello, this is this year's newest model phone.

lines.speaker: 顾客
lines.chinese: 这个多少钱？
lines.pinyin: Zhège duōshǎo qián?
lines.english: How much is this?

lines.speaker: 售货员
lines.chinese: 五千八百块，现在买还可以打折。
lines.pinyin: Wǔqiān bābǎi kuài, xiànzài mǎi hái kěyǐ dǎzhé.
lines.english: 5800 yuan, if you buy now you can get a discount.

lines.speaker: 顾客
lines.chinese: 太贵了，有没有便宜一点儿的？
lines.pinyin: Tài guì le, yǒu méiyǒu piányi yīdiǎnr de?
lines.english: That's too expensive, do you have anything cheaper?

lines.speaker: 售货员
lines.chinese: 买对的，不买贵的。这款两千块的也很好用。
lines.pinyin: Mǎi duì de, bù mǎi guì de. Zhè kuǎn liǎng qiān kuài de yě hěn hǎo yòng.
lines.english: Buy what's right, not what's expensive. This 2000 yuan model is also very useful.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你这件衣服真好看，很贵吧？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zhè jiàn yīfu zhēn hǎokàn, hěn guì ba?
lines.english: Your clothes look great, must be expensive?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 不贵，才一百块。
lines.pinyin: Bú guì, cái yībǎi kuài.
lines.english: Not expensive, only 100 yuan.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 在哪买的？
lines.pinyin: Zài nǎ mǎi de?
lines.english: Where did you buy it?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 网上买的，买东西不一定要买贵的，适合自己的就是最好的。
lines.pinyin: Wǎngshàng mǎi de, mǎi dōngxi bú yídìng yào mǎi guì de, shìhé zìjǐ de jiùshì zuì hǎo de.
lines.english: Bought online. Shopping doesn't always mean buying expensive things, what suits you is the best.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 这个书包三百块，那个五百块，你要哪个？
lines.pinyin: Zhège shūbāo sānbǎi kuài, nàge wǔbǎi kuài, nǐ yào nǎge?
lines.english: This backpack is 300, that one is 500, which do you want?

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 我要三百块的那个。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yào sānbǎi kuài de nàge.
lines.english: I want the 300 yuan one.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 为什么不要贵的？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme bú yào guì de?
lines.english: Why don't you want the expensive one?

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 这个就很好，而且我更喜欢这个颜色。
lines.pinyin: Zhège jiù hěn hǎo, érqiě wǒ gèng xǐhuan zhège yánsè.
lines.english: This one is good, and I prefer this color.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你买车了吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ mǎi chē le ma?
lines.english: Did you buy a car?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 买了，一辆二手车。
lines.pinyin: Mǎi le, yī liàng èrshǒu chē.
lines.english: Yes, a used car.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 为什么不买新车？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme bù mǎi xīn chē?
lines.english: Why not buy a new car?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 买对的，不买贵的。这辆车虽然不是新的，但是质量很好。
lines.pinyin: Mǎi duì de, bù mǎi guì de. Zhè liàng chē suīrán bú shì xīn de, dànshì zhìliàng hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Buy what's right, not what's expensive. Although this car isn't new, the quality is good.

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 你最近身体怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn shēntǐ zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How has your health been recently?

lines.speaker: 病人
lines.chinese: 总是头疼，睡眠也不好。
lines.pinyin: Zǒngshì tóuténg, shuìmián yě bù hǎo.
lines.english: Always headaches, and sleep isn't good either.

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 你每天几点睡觉？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān jǐ diǎn shuìjiào?
lines.english: What time do you go to bed every day?

lines.speaker: 病人
lines.chinese: 经常十二点以后才睡。
lines.pinyin: Jīngcháng shí'èr diǎn yǐhòu cái shuì.
lines.english: Often after twelve o'clock.

lines.speaker: 医生
lines.chinese: 最好的医生是自己。你要注意休息，早睡早起。
lines.pinyin: Zuì hǎo de yīshēng shì zìjǐ. Nǐ yào zhùyì xiūxi, zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ.
lines.english: The best doctor is yourself. You need to pay attention to rest, go to bed early and get up early.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 我妈妈总是说我不爱惜身体。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ māma zǒngshì shuō wǒ bú àixi shēntǐ.
lines.english: My mom always says I don't take care of my body.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 你妈妈说得对，健康是最重要的。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ māma shuō de duì, jiànkāng shì zuì zhòngyào de.
lines.english: Your mom is right, health is the most important thing.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 我知道，但是工作太忙了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhīdào, dànshì gōngzuò tài máng le.
lines.english: I know, but work is too busy.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 最好的医生是自己，只有自己最了解自己的身体。
lines.pinyin: Zuì hǎo de yīshēng shì zìjǐ, zhǐyǒu zìjǐ zuì liǎojiě zìjǐ de shēntǐ.
lines.english: The best doctor is yourself, only you know your body best.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 身体不舒服为什么还要来上课？
lines.pinyin: Shēntǐ bú shūfu wèishénme hái yào lái shàngkè?
lines.english: Why come to class when you're not feeling well?

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 我不想缺课。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bù xiǎng quēkè.
lines.english: I don't want to miss class.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 学习重要，身体更重要。最好的医生是自己，要学会照顾自己。
lines.pinyin: Xuéxí zhòngyào, shēntǐ gèng zhòngyào. Zuì hǎo de yīshēng shì zìjǐ, yào xuéhuì zhàogù zìjǐ.
lines.english: Studying is important, but health is more important. The best doctor is yourself, learn to take care of yourself.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你有什么保持健康的秘诀吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu shénme bǎochí jiànkāng de mìjué ma?
lines.english: Do you have any secrets for staying healthy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 多运动，少吃药。
lines.pinyin: Duō yùndòng, shǎo chī yào.
lines.english: Exercise more, take less medicine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 说得好，最好的医生是自己。
lines.pinyin: Shuō de hǎo, zuì hǎo de yīshēng shì zìjǐ.
lines.english: Well said, the best doctor is yourself.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，预防比治疗更重要。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, yùfáng bǐ zhìliáo gèng zhòngyào.
lines.english: Yes, prevention is more important than treatment.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 你觉得什么是美？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juéde shénme shì měi?
lines.english: What do you think beauty is?

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 美就是好看的东西。
lines.pinyin: Měi jiùshì hǎokàn de dōngxi.
lines.english: Beauty is good-looking things.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 生活中不缺少美，缺少的是发现美的眼睛。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó zhōng bù quēshǎo měi, quēshǎo de shì fāxiàn měi de yǎnjing.
lines.english: Life doesn't lack beauty, what's lacking is eyes that discover beauty.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 老师，我不太明白。
lines.pinyin: Lǎoshī, wǒ bú tài míngbai.
lines.english: Teacher, I don't quite understand.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 意思是说，美无处不在，只要你用心去发现。
lines.pinyin: Yìsi shì shuō, měi wú chù bú zài, zhǐyào nǐ yòngxīn qù fāxiàn.
lines.english: It means beauty is everywhere, as long as you discover it with your heart.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你觉得这座城市怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juéde zhè zuò chéngshì zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: What do you think of this city?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 很普通，没有什么特别的。
lines.pinyin: Hěn pǔtōng, méiyǒu shénme tèbié de.
lines.english: Very ordinary, nothing special.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 生活中不缺少美，你只是缺少发现的眼睛。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó zhōng bù quēshǎo měi, nǐ zhǐshì quēshǎo fāxiàn de yǎnjing.
lines.english: Life doesn't lack beauty, you just lack eyes that discover.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 你说得对，我应该多观察。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, wǒ yīnggāi duō guānchá.
lines.english: You're right, I should observe more.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 看，那朵花多美啊！
lines.pinyin: Kàn, nà duǒ huā duō měi a!
lines.english: Look, how beautiful that flower is!

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 我以前怎么没注意过？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yǐqián zěnme méi zhùyì guo?
lines.english: Why didn't I notice before?

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 生活中不缺少美，缺少的是发现美的眼睛。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó zhōng bù quēshǎo měi, quēshǎo de shì fāxiàn měi de yǎnjing.
lines.english: Life doesn't lack beauty, what's lacking is eyes that discover beauty.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我每天的生活都很无聊。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān de shēnghuó dōu hěn wúliáo.
lines.english: My daily life is very boring.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 试着去发现身边的美吧。
lines.pinyin: Shìzhe qù fāxiàn shēnbiān de měi ba.
lines.english: Try to discover the beauty around you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我身边有美吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shēnbiān yǒu měi ma?
lines.english: Is there beauty around me?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然有，生活中不缺少美，缺少的是发现的眼睛。
lines.pinyin: Dāngrán yǒu, shēnghuó zhōng bù quēshǎo měi, quēshǎo de shì fāxiàn de yǎnjing.
lines.english: Of course, life doesn't lack beauty, what's lacking is eyes that discover.

title: 阳光总在风雨后
title_english: Sunshine always comes after the storm

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你最近工作怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn gōngzuò zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How's your work recently?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 不太顺利，遇到了很多困难。
lines.pinyin: Bú tài shùnlì, yùdào le hěn duō kùnnán.
lines.english: Not very smooth, encountered many difficulties.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 别担心，阳光总在风雨后。
lines.pinyin: Bié dānxīn, yángguāng zǒng zài fēngyǔ hòu.
lines.english: Don't worry, sunshine always comes after the storm.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 谢谢你的鼓励。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ de gǔlì.
lines.english: Thanks for your encouragement.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 这次考试没考好，别灰心。
lines.pinyin: Zhè cì kǎoshì méi kǎo hǎo, bié huīxīn.
lines.english: You didn't do well on this exam, don't be discouraged.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 我已经很努力了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yǐjīng hěn nǔlì le.
lines.english: I've already worked very hard.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 努力总会有收获的，阳光总在风雨后。
lines.pinyin: Nǔlì zǒng huì yǒu shōuhuò de, yángguāng zǒng zài fēngyǔ hòu.
lines.english: Hard work will always bring rewards, sunshine always comes after the storm.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 我会继续努力的。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì de.
lines.english: I will continue to work hard.

lines.speaker: 同事
lines.chinese: 这个项目失败了，我们怎么办？
lines.pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù shībài le, wǒmen zěnme bàn?
lines.english: This project failed, what should we do?

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 失败是成功之母，阳光总在风雨后。
lines.pinyin: Shībài shì chénggōng zhī mǔ, yángguāng zǒng zài fēngyǔ hòu.
lines.english: Failure is the mother of success, sunshine always comes after the storm.

lines.speaker: 同事
lines.chinese: 我们要重新开始吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen yào chóngxīn kāishǐ ma?
lines.english: Do we need to start over?

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 是的，总结经验，重新出发。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, zǒngjié jīngyàn, chóngxīn chūfā.
lines.english: Yes, summarize the experience, start again.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 人生总会遇到困难。
lines.pinyin: Rénshēng zǒng huì yùdào kùnnán.
lines.english: Life will always encounter difficulties.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，但是阳光总在风雨后。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, dànshì yángguāng zǒng zài fēngyǔ hòu.
lines.english: Yes, but sunshine always comes after the storm.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这句话给了我很大鼓励。
lines.pinyin: Zhè jù huà gěi le wǒ hěn dà gǔlì.
lines.english: This sentence gave me great encouragement.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 困难只是暂时的，坚持下去就会成功。
lines.pinyin: Kùnnán zhǐshì zànshí de, jiānchí xiàqù jiù huì chénggōng.
lines.english: Difficulties are temporary, if you persist you will succeed.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 你这次考试考得怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zhè cì kǎoshì kǎo de zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How did you do on this exam?

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 只考了八十分，我不够完美。
lines.pinyin: Zhǐ kǎo le bāshí fēn, wǒ bú gòu wánměi.
lines.english: Only got 80 points, I'm not perfect enough.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 不要过于追求完美，尽力就好。
lines.pinyin: Bú yào guòyú zhuīqiú wánměi, jìnlì jiù hǎo.
lines.english: Don't pursue perfection too much, doing your best is enough.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 可是我想考一百分。
lines.pinyin: Kěshì wǒ xiǎng kǎo yībǎi fēn.
lines.english: But I want to get 100 points.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 没有人是完美的，重要的是你进步了。
lines.pinyin: Méiyǒu rén shì wánměi de, zhòngyào de shì nǐ jìnbù le.
lines.english: No one is perfect, what's important is that you improved.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你对这份工作满意吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ duì zhè fèn gōngzuò mǎnyì ma?
lines.english: Are you satisfied with this job?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 不太满意，我想做到最好。
lines.pinyin: Bú tài mǎnyì, wǒ xiǎng zuò dào zuì hǎo.
lines.english: Not very satisfied, I want to do the best.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 不要过于追求完美，那样会很累。
lines.pinyin: Bú yào guòyú zhuīqiú wánměi, nàyàng huì hěn lèi.
lines.english: Don't pursue perfection too much, that will be very tiring.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 你说的有道理。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de yǒu dàolǐ.
lines.english: What you say makes sense.

lines.speaker: 同事
lines.chinese: 这份报告我改了十遍了。
lines.pinyin: Zhè fèn bàogào wǒ gǎi le shí biàn le.
lines.english: I've revised this report ten times.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 不要过于追求完美，差不多就可以了。
lines.pinyin: Bú yào guòyú zhuīqiú wánměi, chàbùduō jiù kěyǐ le.
lines.english: Don't pursue perfection too much, good enough is fine.

lines.speaker: 同事
lines.chinese: 我想让它更完美一些。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng ràng tā gèng wánměi yīxiē.
lines.english: I want to make it more perfect.

lines.speaker: 经理
lines.chinese: 有时候完美主义反而会影响效率。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu shíhou wánměizhǔyì fǎn'ér huì yǐngxiǎng xiàolǜ.
lines.english: Sometimes perfectionism can actually affect efficiency.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你总是要求自己做到最好。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zǒngshì yāoqiú zìjǐ zuò dào zuì hǎo.
lines.english: You always require yourself to do the best.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，我不喜欢犯错误。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ bù xǐhuan fàn cuòwù.
lines.english: Yes, I don't like making mistakes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不要过于追求完美，允许自己犯错。
lines.pinyin: Bú yào guòyú zhuīqiú wánměi, yǔnxǔ zìjǐ fàn cuò.
lines.english: Don't pursue perfection too much, allow yourself to make mistakes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢你的提醒，我会试着放松一些。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ de tíxǐng, wǒ huì shìzhe fàngsōng yīxiē.
lines.english: Thanks for the reminder, I'll try to relax a bit.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 您觉得什么是幸福？
lines.pinyin: Nín juéde shénme shì xìngfú?
lines.english: What do you think happiness is?

lines.speaker: 路人
lines.chinese: 有钱就是幸福。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu qián jiùshì xìngfú.
lines.english: Having money is happiness.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 您呢？
lines.pinyin: Nín ne?
lines.english: And you?

lines.speaker: 路人2
lines.chinese: 健康就是幸福。
lines.pinyin: Jiànkāng jiùshì xìngfú.
lines.english: Health is happiness.

lines.speaker: 记者
lines.chinese: 幸福的标准因人而异。
lines.pinyin: Xìngfú de biāozhǔn yīn rén ér yì.
lines.english: The standard of happiness varies from person to person.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你看起来很高兴。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ kàn qǐlái hěn gāoxìng.
lines.english: You look very happy.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 是的，我刚刚找到了一份好工作。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ gānggāng zhǎodào le yī fèn hǎo gōngzuò.
lines.english: Yes, I just found a good job.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 幸福的标准真的不一样。
lines.pinyin: Xìngfú de biāozhǔn zhēn de bú yīyàng.
lines.english: The standard of happiness really is different.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 你的幸福是什么？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ de xìngfú shì shénme?
lines.english: What's your happiness?

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 能和家人在一起就是我的幸福。
lines.pinyin: Néng hé jiārén zài yīqǐ jiùshì wǒ de xìngfú.
lines.english: Being with family is my happiness.

lines.speaker: 爷爷
lines.chinese: 孩子，你幸福吗？
lines.pinyin: Háizi, nǐ xìngfú ma?
lines.english: Child, are you happy?

lines.speaker: 孙子
lines.chinese: 我很幸福，有爷爷陪我玩。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hěn xìngfú, yǒu yéye péi wǒ wán.
lines.english: I'm very happy, grandpa plays with me.

lines.speaker: 爷爷
lines.chinese: 幸福的标准其实很简单。
lines.pinyin: Xìngfú de biāozhǔn qíshí hěn jiǎndān.
lines.english: The standard of happiness is actually very simple.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 为什么有人很有钱却不幸福？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme yǒurén hěn yǒu qián què bú xìngfú?
lines.english: Why are some people rich but not happy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 因为幸福的标准不一样。
lines.pinyin: Yīnwèi xìngfú de biāozhǔn bú yīyàng.
lines.english: Because the standard of happiness is different.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那怎么才能幸福？
lines.pinyin: Nà zěnme cáinéng xìngfú?
lines.english: Then how can one be happy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 找到自己的幸福标准，不要跟别人比。
lines.pinyin: Zhǎodào zìjǐ de xìngfú biāozhǔn, bú yào gēn biérén bǐ.
lines.english: Find your own standard of happiness, don't compare with others.

title: 读书好，读好书，好读书
title_english: Reading is good, read good books, love reading

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 读书好，读好书，好读书。
lines.pinyin: Dúshū hǎo, dú hǎoshū, hào dúshū.
lines.english: Reading is good, read good books, love reading.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 老师，这是什么意思？
lines.pinyin: Lǎoshī, zhè shì shénme yìsi?
lines.english: Teacher, what does this mean?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 读书很有好处，要选择好书来读，并且要喜欢读书。
lines.pinyin: Dúshū hěn yǒu hǎochù, yào xuǎnzé hǎoshū lái dú, bìngqiě yào xǐhuan dúshū.
lines.english: Reading has many benefits, choose good books to read, and love reading.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 我明白了，我要多读好书。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ míngbai le, wǒ yào duō dú hǎoshū.
lines.english: I understand, I will read more good books.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你平时喜欢看什么书？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí xǐhuan kàn shénme shū?
lines.english: What books do you usually like to read?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 我喜欢看历史书和小说。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan kàn lìshǐ shū hé xiǎoshuō.
lines.english: I like reading history books and novels.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 读书好，读好书，好读书。
lines.pinyin: Dúshū hǎo, dú hǎoshū, hào dúshū.
lines.english: Reading is good, read good books, love reading.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 是的，读书让人增长知识。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, dúshū ràng rén zēngzhǎng zhīshi.
lines.english: Yes, reading increases knowledge.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 孩子，不要总是玩手机，多读读书。
lines.pinyin: Háizi, bú yào zǒngshì wán shǒujī, duō dúdú shū.
lines.english: Child, don't always play with phone, read more books.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 读书有什么用？
lines.pinyin: Dúshū yǒu shénme yòng?
lines.english: What's the use of reading?

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 读书好，读好书，好读书。读书可以让你变得更聪明。
lines.pinyin: Dúshū hǎo, dú hǎoshū, hào dúshū. Dúshū kěyǐ ràng nǐ biàn de gèng cōngming.
lines.english: Reading is good, read good books, love reading. Reading can make you smarter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你每天读书吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān dúshū ma?
lines.english: Do you read every day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，我每天睡前都会读半小时书。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ měitiān shuìqián dōu huì dú bàn xiǎoshí shū.
lines.english: Yes, I read for half an hour before bed every day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好习惯！读书好，读好书，好读书。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo xíguàn! Dúshū hǎo, dú hǎoshū, hào dúshū.
lines.english: Good habit! Reading is good, read good books, love reading.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 希望更多人能养成读书的好习惯。
lines.pinyin: Xīwàng gèng duō rén néng yǎngchéng dúshū de hǎo xíguàn.
lines.english: Hope more people can develop the good habit of reading.

title: 用心发现世界
title_english: Discover the world with your heart

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 用心发现世界，你会发现很多美好的东西。
lines.pinyin: Yòngxīn fāxiàn shìjiè, nǐ huì fāxiàn hěn duō měihǎo de dōngxi.
lines.english: Discover the world with your heart, and you'll find many beautiful things.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 老师，怎么用心发现呢？
lines.pinyin: Lǎoshī, zěnme yòngxīn fāxiàn ne?
lines.english: Teacher, how do I discover with my heart?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 多观察，多思考，多感受。
lines.pinyin: Duō guānchá, duō sīkǎo, duō gǎnshòu.
lines.english: Observe more, think more, feel more.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 这个世界太无聊了。
lines.pinyin: Zhège shìjiè tài wúliáo le.
lines.english: This world is too boring.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 用心发现世界，你会改变看法的。
lines.pinyin: Yòngxīn fāxiàn shìjiè, nǐ huì gǎibiàn kànfǎ de.
lines.english: Discover the world with your heart, and you'll change your view.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 真的吗？我试试看。
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Wǒ shìshi kàn.
lines.english: Really? I'll try.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 用心发现世界，世界会变得很精彩。
lines.pinyin: Yòngxīn fāxiàn shìjiè, shìjiè huì biàn de hěn jīngcǎi.
lines.english: Discover the world with your heart, and the world will become wonderful.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 我今天发现了一只很小的蚂蚁。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān fāxiàn le yī zhī hěn xiǎo de mǎyǐ.
lines.english: Today I found a very small ant.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 看，用心观察就会发现有趣的东西。
lines.pinyin: Kàn, yòngxīn guānchá jiù huì fāxiàn yǒuqù de dōngxi.
lines.english: See, observing with your heart you'll find interesting things.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 生活中有很多美好的事物。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó zhōng yǒu hěn duō měihǎo de shìwù.
lines.english: There are many beautiful things in life.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，用心发现世界就能看到。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, yòngxīn fāxiàn shìjiè jiù néng kàndào.
lines.english: Yes, discover the world with your heart and you can see them.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 从今天开始，我要更用心地生活。
lines.pinyin: Cóng jīntiān kāishǐ, wǒ yào gèng yòngxīn de shēnghuó.
lines.english: Starting today, I want to live more attentively.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好主意，我们一起来发现美好吧。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo zhǔyì, wǒmen yīqǐ lái fāxiàn měihǎo ba.
lines.english: Good idea, let's discover beauty together.

title: 喝着茶看京剧
title_english: Drinking tea while watching Peking opera

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你想去喝茶吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng qù hē chá ma?
lines.english: Do you want to go drink tea?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 好啊，顺便可以看京剧。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo a, shùnbiàn kěyǐ kàn jīngjù.
lines.english: Sure, we can also watch Peking opera.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 喝茶看京剧，真是一种享受。
lines.pinyin: Hē chá kàn jīngjù, zhēn shì yī zhǒng xiǎngshòu.
lines.english: Drinking tea and watching Peking opera is truly enjoyable.

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 这是很传统的中国生活方式。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì hěn chuántǒng de Zhōngguó shēnghuó fāngshì.
lines.english: This is a very traditional Chinese lifestyle.

lines.speaker: 外国朋友
lines.chinese: 京剧是什么？
lines.pinyin: Jīngjù shì shénme?
lines.english: What is Peking opera?

lines.speaker: 中国朋友
lines.chinese: 京剧是中国的一种传统艺术。
lines.pinyin: Jīngjù shì Zhōngguó de yī zhǒng chuántǒng yìshù.
lines.english: Peking opera is a traditional Chinese art form.

lines.speaker: 外国朋友
lines.chinese: 我们可以边喝茶边看京剧吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen kěyǐ biān hē chá biān kàn jīngjù ma?
lines.english: Can we drink tea while watching Peking opera?

lines.speaker: 中国朋友
lines.chinese: 当然可以，这就是最好的体验方式。
lines.pinyin: Dāngrán kěyǐ, zhè jiùshì zuì hǎo de tǐyàn fāngshì.
lines.english: Of course, this is the best way to experience it.

lines.speaker: 服务员
lines.chinese: 您要喝什么茶？
lines.pinyin: Nín yào hē shénme chá?
lines.english: What tea would you like to drink?

lines.speaker: 顾客
lines.chinese: 龙井茶吧，一边喝茶一边看京剧。
lines.pinyin: Lóngjīng chá ba, yībiān hē chá yībiān kàn jīngjù.
lines.english: Longjing tea, drinking tea while watching Peking opera.

lines.speaker: 服务员
lines.chinese: 好的，今天的京剧演出很精彩。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, jīntiān de jīngjù yǎnchū hěn jīngcǎi.
lines.english: Okay, today's Peking opera performance is wonderful.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你喜欢看京剧吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuan kàn jīngjù ma?
lines.english: Do you like watching Peking opera?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 喜欢，特别是喝着茶看京剧，很放松。
lines.pinyin: Xǐhuan, tèbié shì hē zhe chá kàn jīngjù, hěn fàngsōng.
lines.english: Yes, especially drinking tea while watching Peking opera, very relaxing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这是一种很好的文化体验。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì yī zhǒng hěn hǎo de wénhuà tǐyàn.
lines.english: This is a great cultural experience.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 下次我们再一起去吧。
lines.pinyin: Xià cì wǒmen zài yīqǐ qù ba.
lines.english: Let's go together again next time.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 保护地球母亲是每个人的责任。
lines.pinyin: Bǎohù dìqiú mǔqīn shì měi gè rén de zérèn.
lines.english: Protecting Mother Earth is everyone's responsibility.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 我们能做什么呢？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen néng zuò shénme ne?
lines.english: What can we do?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 从小事做起，节约用水、用电，少用塑料袋。
lines.pinyin: Cóng xiǎoshì zuò qǐ, jiéyuē yòng shuǐ, yòng diàn, shǎo yòng sùliào dài.
lines.english: Start with small things, save water and electricity, use fewer plastic bags.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你为什么骑自行车上班？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ wèishénme qí zìxíngchē shàngbān?
lines.english: Why do you ride a bike to work?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 为了保护地球母亲，减少空气污染。
lines.pinyin: Wèile bǎohù dìqiú mǔqīn, jiǎnshǎo kōngqì wūrǎn.
lines.english: To protect Mother Earth, reduce air pollution.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 真环保！我也要向你学习。
lines.pinyin: Zhēn huánbǎo! Wǒ yě yào xiàng nǐ xuéxí.
lines.english: So environmentally friendly! I should learn from you too.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 把垃圾分类放好。
lines.pinyin: Bǎ lājī fēnlèi fàng hǎo.
lines.english: Sort the garbage properly.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 为什么要分类？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme yào fēnlèi?
lines.english: Why sort?

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 保护地球母亲，让资源可以循环利用。
lines.pinyin: Bǎohù dìqiú mǔqīn, ràng zīyuán kěyǐ xúnhuán lìyòng.
lines.english: To protect Mother Earth, so resources can be recycled.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 我明白了，我会做好垃圾分类。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ míngbai le, wǒ huì zuò hǎo lājī fēnlèi.
lines.english: I understand, I'll do garbage sorting well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 地球是我们的家园。
lines.pinyin: Dìqiú shì wǒmen de jiāyuán.
lines.english: Earth is our home.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，保护地球母亲很重要。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, bǎohù dìqiú mǔqīn hěn zhòngyào.
lines.english: Yes, protecting Mother Earth is very important.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 每个人都应该为环保做点什么。
lines.pinyin: Měi gè rén dōu yīnggāi wèi huánbǎo zuò diǎn shénme.
lines.english: Everyone should do something for the environment.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 从自己做起，从小事做起。
lines.pinyin: Cóng zìjǐ zuò qǐ, cóng xiǎoshì zuò qǐ.
lines.english: Start with yourself, start with small things.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 教育孩子是一门艺术。
lines.pinyin: Jiàoyù háizi shì yī mén yìshù.
lines.english: Educating children is an art.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 是的，不能太严也不能太松。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, bù néng tài yán yě bù néng tài sōng.
lines.english: Yes, can't be too strict or too loose.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 要了解孩子，尊重孩子。
lines.pinyin: Yào liǎojiě háizi, zūnzhòng háizi.
lines.english: Need to understand the child, respect the child.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 教育孩子要有耐心。
lines.pinyin: Jiàoyù háizi yào yǒu nàixīn.
lines.english: Educating children requires patience.

lines.speaker: 家长
lines.chinese: 孩子不听话的时候，我就很着急。
lines.pinyin: Háizi bù tīnghuà de shíhou, wǒ jiù hěn zháojí.
lines.english: When the child doesn't listen, I get anxious.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 教育孩子是一门艺术，需要慢慢学习。
lines.pinyin: Jiàoyù háizi shì yī mén yìshù, xūyào mànman xuéxí.
lines.english: Educating children is an art, needs to be learned slowly.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你是怎么教育孩子的？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shì zěnme jiàoyù háizi de?
lines.english: How do you educate your child?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 我试着和孩子做朋友，多沟通。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shìzhe hé háizi zuò péngyǒu, duō gōutōng.
lines.english: I try to be friends with my child, communicate more.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 好方法，教育孩子确实是一门艺术。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo fāngfǎ, jiàoyù háizi quèshí shì yī mén yìshù.
lines.english: Good method, educating children is indeed an art.

lines.speaker: 爷爷
lines.chinese: 教育孩子不能只看成绩。
lines.pinyin: Jiàoyù háizi bù néng zhǐ kàn chéngjì.
lines.english: Educating children shouldn't only look at grades.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 那应该看什么？
lines.pinyin: Nà yīnggāi kàn shénme?
lines.english: Then what should we look at?

lines.speaker: 爷爷
lines.chinese: 要看孩子的品格和兴趣，教育孩子是一门艺术。
lines.pinyin: Yào kàn háizi de pǐngé hé xìngqù, jiàoyù háizi shì yī mén yìshù.
lines.english: Look at the child's character and interests, educating children is an art.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 谢谢您的建议。
lines.pinyin: Xièxie nín de jiànyì.
lines.english: Thanks for your advice.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你对现在的生活满意吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ duì xiànzài de shēnghuó mǎnyì ma?
lines.english: Are you satisfied with your current life?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 还可以，但是总想更好。
lines.pinyin: Hái kěyǐ, dànshì zǒng xiǎng gèng hǎo.
lines.english: It's okay, but I always want better.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 生活可以更美好，只要你有好的心态。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó kěyǐ gèng měihǎo, zhǐyào nǐ yǒu hǎo de xīntài.
lines.english: Life can be more beautiful, as long as you have a good mindset.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 生活可以更美好，看你用什么态度去面对。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó kěyǐ gèng měihǎo, kàn nǐ yòng shénme tàidù qù miànduì.
lines.english: Life can be more beautiful, depends on what attitude you use to face it.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 我总是觉得生活很累。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zǒngshì juéde shēnghuó hěn lèi.
lines.english: I always feel life is tiring.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 换个角度看问题，生活会变得不一样。
lines.pinyin: Huàn gè jiǎodù kàn wèntí, shēnghuó huì biàn de bù yīyàng.
lines.english: Look at problems from another angle, life will become different.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 生活可以更美好，只要你愿意改变。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó kěyǐ gèng měihǎo, zhǐyào nǐ yuànyì gǎibiàn.
lines.english: Life can be more beautiful, as long as you're willing to change.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 我怎么改变呢？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zěnme gǎibiàn ne?
lines.english: How do I change?

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 从小事开始，比如每天微笑，帮助别人。
lines.pinyin: Cóng xiǎoshì kāishǐ, bǐrú měitiān wēixiào, bāngzhù biérén.
lines.english: Start with small things, like smiling every day, helping others.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 怎样才能让生活更美好？
lines.pinyin: Zěn yàng cáinéng ràng shēnghuó gèng měihǎo?
lines.english: How can we make life more beautiful?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 积极面对生活，珍惜每一天。
lines.pinyin: Jījí miànduì shēnghuó, zhēnxī měi yī tiān.
lines.english: Face life positively, cherish every day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你说得对，态度决定一切。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, tàidù juédìng yīqiè.
lines.english: You're right, attitude determines everything.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 生活可以更美好，从现在开始改变吧。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó kěyǐ gèng měihǎo, cóng xiànzài kāishǐ gǎibiàn ba.
lines.english: Life can be more beautiful, start changing from now.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 人与自然应该和谐相处。
lines.pinyin: Rén yǔ zìrán yīnggāi héxié xiāngchǔ.
lines.english: Humans and nature should live in harmony.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 老师，什么是和谐相处？
lines.pinyin: Lǎoshī, shénme shì héxié xiāngchǔ?
lines.english: Teacher, what is living in harmony?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 就是尊重自然，保护环境，不破坏生态。
lines.pinyin: Jiùshì zūnzhòng zìrán, bǎohù huánjìng, bú pòhuài shēngtài.
lines.english: It means respecting nature, protecting the environment, not destroying ecology.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你喜欢去公园吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuan qù gōngyuán ma?
lines.english: Do you like going to parks?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 喜欢，那里可以感受到人与自然的和谐。
lines.pinyin: Xǐhuan, nàlǐ kěyǐ gǎnshòu dào rén yǔ zìrán de héxié.
lines.english: Yes, there you can feel the harmony between humans and nature.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 我们要多接触大自然。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen yào duō jiēchù dà zìrán.
lines.english: We should connect with nature more.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 看，那片森林很美。
lines.pinyin: Kàn, nà piàn sēnlín hěn měi.
lines.english: Look, that forest is beautiful.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 为什么要保护森林？
lines.pinyin: Wèishénme yào bǎohù sēnlín?
lines.english: Why protect forests?

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 因为人与自然是分不开的，保护自然就是保护我们自己。
lines.pinyin: Yīnwèi rén yǔ zìrán shì fēn bu kāi de, bǎohù zìrán jiùshì bǎohù wǒmen zìjǐ.
lines.english: Because humans and nature are inseparable, protecting nature is protecting ourselves.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 现在环境污染很严重。
lines.pinyin: Xiànzài huánjìng wūrǎn hěn yánzhòng.
lines.english: Environmental pollution is very serious now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，人与自然的关系出了问题。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, rén yǔ zìrán de guānxi chū le wèntí.
lines.english: Yes, the relationship between humans and nature has problems.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们每个人都要为保护环境努力。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen měi gè rén dōu yào wèi bǎohù huánjìng nǔlì.
lines.english: Everyone needs to work hard to protect the environment.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 从自己做起，从小事做起。
lines.pinyin: Cóng zìjǐ zuò qǐ, cóng xiǎoshì zuò qǐ.
lines.english: Start with yourself, start with small things.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 科技改变了我们的生活。
lines.pinyin: Kējì gǎibiàn le wǒmen de shēnghuó.
lines.english: Technology has changed our lives.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 是的，现在的生活方便多了。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, xiànzài de shēnghuó fāngbiàn duō le.
lines.english: Yes, life now is much more convenient.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 科技与世界的关系越来越密切。
lines.pinyin: Kējì yǔ shìjiè de guānxi yuè lái yuè mìqiè.
lines.english: The relationship between technology and the world is becoming closer.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你觉得科技发展好吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juéde kējì fāzhǎn hǎo ma?
lines.english: Do you think technological development is good?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 有好有坏，科技让世界变小了。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu hǎo yǒu huài, kējì ràng shìjiè biàn xiǎo le.
lines.english: There are pros and cons, technology has made the world smaller.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 科技与世界紧密相连。
lines.pinyin: Kējì yǔ shìjiè jǐnmì xiānglián.
lines.english: Technology and the world are closely connected.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 以前我们要写信联系朋友。
lines.pinyin: Yǐqián wǒmen yào xiě xìn liánxì péngyǒu.
lines.english: Before we had to write letters to contact friends.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 现在用手机就行了。
lines.pinyin: Xiànzài yòng shǒujī jiù xíng le.
lines.english: Now we just use phones.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 是的，科技改变了世界。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, kējì gǎibiàn le shìjiè.
lines.english: Yes, technology has changed the world.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 科技发展太快了。
lines.pinyin: Kējì fāzhǎn tài kuài le.
lines.english: Technology develops too fast.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，科技与世界一起变化。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, kējì yǔ shìjiè yīqǐ biànhuà.
lines.english: Yes, technology changes together with the world.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们要学会适应这些变化。
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen yào xuéhuì shìyìng zhèxiē biànhuà.
lines.english: We need to learn to adapt to these changes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，既要利用科技，也要保持平衡。
lines.pinyin: Duì, jì yào lìyòng kējì, yě yào bǎochí pínghéng.
lines.english: Right, we should use technology but also maintain balance.

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 生活的味道就像一道菜。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó de wèidào jiù xiàng yī dào cài.
lines.english: The taste of life is like a dish.

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 妈妈，这是什么意思？
lines.pinyin: Māma, zhè shì shénme yìsi?
lines.english: Mom, what does this mean?

lines.speaker: 妈妈
lines.chinese: 有甜有苦，有酸有辣，这就是生活的味道。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu tián yǒu kǔ, yǒu suān yǒu là, zhè jiùshì shēnghuó de wèidào.
lines.english: Sweet and bitter, sour and spicy, that's the taste of life.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你最近过得怎么样？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn guò de zěnmeyàng?
lines.english: How have you been lately?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 有开心也有难过，这就是生活的味道。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu kāixīn yě yǒu nánguò, zhè jiùshì shēnghuó de wèidào.
lines.english: There's happiness and sadness, that's the taste of life.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 说得好，生活就是这样丰富多彩。
lines.pinyin: Shuō de hǎo, shēnghuó jiùshì zhèyàng fēngfù duōcǎi.
lines.english: Well said, life is so colorful.

lines.speaker: 爷爷
lines.chinese: 生活的味道要慢慢品尝。
lines.pinyin: Shēnghuó de wèidào yào mànman pǐncháng.
lines.english: The taste of life needs to be savored slowly.

lines.speaker: 孙子
lines.chinese: 爷爷，我不懂。
lines.pinyin: Yéye, wǒ bù dǒng.
lines.english: Grandpa, I don't understand.

lines.speaker: 爷爷
lines.chinese: 意思是说要认真生活，感受每一天。
lines.pinyin: Yìsi shì shuō yào rènzhēn shēnghuó, gǎnshòu měi yī tiān.
lines.english: It means to live seriously, feel every day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你觉得生活是什么味道的？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ juéde shēnghuó shì shénme wèidào de?
lines.english: What taste do you think life has?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有时候甜，有时候苦。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu shíhou tián, yǒu shíhou kǔ.
lines.english: Sometimes sweet, sometimes bitter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这就是生活的味道啊。
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiùshì shēnghuó de wèidào a.
lines.english: That's the taste of life.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，不同的味道让生活更有意思。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, bùtóng de wèidào ràng shēnghuó gèng yǒu yìsi.
lines.english: Yes, different tastes make life more interesting.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 你旅行的时候最喜欢什么？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ lǚxíng de shíhou zuì xǐhuan shénme?
lines.english: What do you like most when traveling?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 我最喜欢沿途的风景。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zuì xǐhuan yántú de fēngjǐng.
lines.english: I like the scenery along the way most.

lines.speaker: 朋友
lines.chinese: 不是目的地吗？
lines.pinyin: Bú shì mùdìdì ma?
lines.english: Not the destination?

lines.speaker: 我
lines.chinese: 不是，过程比结果更重要。
lines.pinyin: Bú shì, guòchéng bǐ jiéguǒ gèng zhòngyào.
lines.english: No, the process is more important than the result.

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 人生就像旅行，不要只看终点。
lines.pinyin: Rénshēng jiù xiàng lǚxíng, bú yào zhǐ kàn zhōngdiǎn.
lines.english: Life is like traveling, don't just look at the endpoint.

lines.speaker: 学生
lines.chinese: 老师，那应该看什么？
lines.pinyin: Lǎoshī, nà yīnggāi kàn shénme?
lines.english: Teacher, then what should we look at?

lines.speaker: 老师
lines.chinese: 要看沿途的风景，享受每一个过程。
lines.pinyin: Yào kàn yántú de fēngjǐng, xiǎngshòu měi yī gè guòchéng.
lines.english: Look at the scenery along the way, enjoy every process.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 这次旅行你开心吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhè cì lǚxíng nǐ kāixīn ma?
lines.english: Were you happy on this trip?

lines.speaker: 孩子
lines.chinese: 很开心，沿途的风景太美了。
lines.pinyin: Hěn kāixīn, yántú de fēngjǐng tài měi le.
lines.english: Very happy, the scenery along the way was beautiful.

lines.speaker: 爸爸
lines.chinese: 对，旅行的意义就在于沿途的风景。
lines.pinyin: Duì, lǚxíng de yìyì jiù zàiyú yántú de fēngjǐng.
lines.english: Yes, the meaning of travel lies in the scenery along the way.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们要去哪里？
lines.pinyin: Wǒmen yào qù nǎlǐ?
lines.english: Where are we going?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不重要，重要的是沿途的风景。
lines.pinyin: Bú zhòngyào, zhòngyào de shì yántú de fēngjǐng.
lines.english: Not important, what's important is the scenery along the way.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你说的有道理，我们出发吧。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de yǒu dàolǐ, wǒmen chūfā ba.
lines.english: You make sense, let's go.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 一起去发现美好的风景。
lines.pinyin: Yīqǐ qù fāxiàn měihǎo de fēngjǐng.
lines.english: Let's discover beautiful scenery together.
